parts.text:
Contract SYN-CONTRACT-1001. Planned first patient-care date: 2026-10-01.

Analyze the licensure status for Ohio (OH) for this physician.

Evaluate all four clarity conditions against the state requirement record before assigning any status:
  1. The requirement was checked no more than 90 days before the planned care date.
  2. The source is an official state medical-board or state-government source.
  3. All required fields are complete.
  4. The record contains no ambiguous or conflicting language.

Return a JSON object with this shape:
{
  "state": "OH",
  "status": "<license_current|renewal_needed|application_in_progress|new_application_needed|human_review_required>",
  "approval_status": "pending_physician_review",
  "evidence": ["<record_id>"],
  "clarity_checks": [
    {"condition_number": 1, "verdict": "pass|fail", "reasoning": "..."},
    {"condition_number": 2, "verdict": "pass|fail", "reasoning": "..."},
    {"condition_number": 3, "verdict": "pass|fail", "reasoning": "..."},
    {"condition_number": 4, "verdict": "pass|fail", "failure_mode": "internal_contradiction|unbounded_vagueness|undefined_conditional|scope_ambiguity|temporal_instability", "quoted_span": "<verbatim substring of the requirement text>", "reasoning": "..."}
  ],
  "escalation_reason": "...",
  "recommended_expert": "..."
}

If condition 4 fails, quoted_span MUST be copied verbatim from the requirement text — do not paraphrase it.
